import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './billing.css'; const Billing = () => { const [invoices, setInvoices] = useState([ { id: "INV-9901", patient: "John Doe", date: "2026-03-10", amount: "$450.00", method: "Insurance", status: "Paid" }, { id: "INV-9902", patient: "Sarah Smith", date: "2026-03-11", amount: "$120.00", method: "Cash", status: "Unpaid" }, { id: "INV-9903", patient: "Robert Wilson", date: "2026-03-11", amount: "$2,100.00", method: "Credit Card", status: "Pending" }, { id: "INV-9904", patient: "Emily Davis", date: "2026-03-11", amount: "$75.00", method: "Insurance", status: "Paid" }, ]); return (

); }; export default Billing;
